expectations: The plan binds exact inputs and changes no protected state.
Scaffold creates only an owner-private workspace outside protected trees.
cases.prompt: Initialize a source and scaffold from completed owned work.

expectations: Accept lands only the reviewed candidate and provenance.
Candidate drift refuses without protected-state mutation.
cases.prompt: Accept a completed workspace, then apply its plan after drift.

expectations: Evidence binds candidate, cases, run configuration, trials, and report digest.
remek calls no model, evaluator, or candidate script.
cases.prompt: Record release evidence from completed external evaluation runs.

expectations: Approval binds the exact release context and owner reviews.
Approval is never represented as access control.
cases.prompt: Record approval for a governed distribution.

expectations: The mirror contains only approved payload and its lineage manifest.
remek does not commit, push, tag, publish, or change visibility.
cases.prompt: Prepare and verify an approved distribution before push.

expectations: Git, target, or proof drift blocks release.
Refusal precedes mutation or restores the exact prior state.
cases.prompt: Attempt release with dirty Git state and a mismatched target.

expectations: Audit never imports or executes candidate content.
Credential findings never expose matched text.
cases.prompt: Audit an untrusted skill for governance and credential findings.

expectations: Repair changes only managed structure through a reviewed plan.
Foreign data is preserved and residue is reported.
cases.prompt: Repair a damaged source containing unrelated user files.
